Class ManagerDashboardController

java.lang.Object
ManagerDashboardController
public class ManagerDashboardController extends Object
Controller class for the Manager Dashboard. Handles administrative tasks such as managing inventory, employees, and menu items, as well as viewing sales trends and reports.

    Method
    Description
    private void
    addEmployeeToDB()
    Adds a new employee to the database.
    private void
    addInventoryItemToDB()
    Adds a new inventory item to the database.
    private void
    addMenuItemToDB()
    Adds a new menu item to the database based on user input.

    getConnection()
    Establishes a connection to the database using credentials from dbSetup.
    void
    initialize()
    Initializes the controller class.
    private void
    loadInventory()
    Fetches current inventory levels from the database and populates the table.
    private void
    loadItemTrends()
    Loads sales trends data for the chart.
    private void
    loadMenuData()
    Fetches all menu items from the database and populates the menu management table.
    private void
    loadQuarterlyOverview()
    Calculates and displays total orders and revenue for the last 3 months.
    private void
    loadSchedule()
    Generates a random schedule using employee names fetched from the database.
    private void
    sendMessage()
    Simulates sending a message in the team chat.

  • Constructor Details

    • ManagerDashboardController

      public ManagerDashboardController()

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes the controller class. Sets up table columns, loads initial data for inventory, trends, schedule, and menu. Configures event handlers for buttons.

    • sendMessage

      private void sendMessage()
      Simulates sending a message in the team chat.

    • loadInventory

      private void loadInventory()
      Fetches current inventory levels from the database and populates the table.

    • loadItemTrends

      private void loadItemTrends()
      Loads sales trends data for the chart. Aggregates total revenue by day of the week.

    • loadQuarterlyOverview

      private void loadQuarterlyOverview()
      Calculates and displays total orders and revenue for the last 3 months.

    • loadSchedule

      private void loadSchedule()
      Generates a random schedule using employee names fetched from the database.

    • loadMenuData

      private void loadMenuData()
      Fetches all menu items from the database and populates the menu management table.

    • addMenuItemToDB

      private void addMenuItemToDB()
      Adds a new menu item to the database based on user input.

    • addInventoryItemToDB

      private void addInventoryItemToDB()
      Adds a new inventory item to the database.

    • addEmployeeToDB

      private void addEmployeeToDB()
      Adds a new employee to the database.

    • getConnection

      private Connection getConnection() throws SQLException
      Establishes a connection to the database using credentials from dbSetup.
      Returns:
      Connection object
      Throws:
      SQLException - if connection fails
